text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Make haste! We're off to overthrow the demon lord!

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text:
Stop right there! Umamusume, schmusume! You're just a level 1
brawler.

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text:
The name's Mercenary Machos! And I ain't lettin' you so-called
Umamusume walk around all high and mighty. Prepare to have your
lights knocked out.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El... Be careful. This man has more than just brawn up his sleeve. He's
hiding something in his hand.

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text:
Huh, so you noticed! That's right. I got a secret weapon that can give
me superhuman strength.

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: It's called a Growth Potion! You just take a sip, and—Wroaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wh-wh-wh-what?! Your body just doubled in size!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: A Growth Potion... I see. It's a potion that turns you into a giant.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Although... Pardon me asking, but do you feel all right? Your muscles
look awfully swollen and stiff...

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Cough... hack... It's just a side effect, nuthin' someone tough like me can't handle!

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text:
Double the stature, double the strength! Imma crush you both like
little ants! Arghhhh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Heh, perfect timin'! Lemme be the first to show ya—an Umamusume's
got three times the strength of a human!

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: You lil' brat! Imma knock you into next week!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaah! Shrieking Condor Wave!

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: Gahhhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: W-was that an ult?! I've never seen a move like that before!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That little punch? Please! That wasn't even a skill!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We Umamusume never get the chance to deliver full-power punches
in the real world, but if we did, you bet it'd be somethin' like that!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
At most, we do pretend punches for performances, but there's no
need to hold back in a video game.

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
Ohh... If you're that powerful, you may truly be able to take on the
demon lord and their servants.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ma'am, may I ask you a question about this demon lord that's
threatening your world?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Did their arrival really come without any sign or notice?

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. The moment the demon lord arrived, all of this world's
demons and monsters fell under their control. We've been forced into
a corner ever since.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna beat that tyrant to a pulp!

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
You do possess extraordinary power, dear brawler, but if the legend
is true, it likely won't be you who defeats the demon lord.

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
"Fantasy incarnate shall look down upon this world from the heavens.
With innate, thunderous power, she will deliver unto the demon lord a
strike of destruction and felicity alike."

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
In the prophecy, the demon lord is bested by a strike of thunderous
power from the heavens.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A heavenly lightning strike... I'm not entirely certain, but it could
mean divine retribution from an angel, perhaps.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Your outfit looks pretty angelic! Maybe you'll learn some lightning skills... Even a demon lord wouldn't wanna face your retribution!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ow, ow, ow, ow! That really hurt! And don't tell me it was an accident!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You might have a point, though. My class does appear to be on the
angelic side. Let me check my skill tree for high level cleric spells.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh. There's one called "Angelic Bolt" that summons lighting.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps that could be our secret weapon. But at the moment, my level
is nowhere near high enough to cast it...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, I see... Well, there's only one solution to that issue.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's time to grind some XP! Let's see what's around the village and
start raising our levels!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And so, we begin our adventure by explorin' the surroundin' area!
However!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, what are you doing? You can't just barge into someone's home and
open their drawers.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, you can't just throw that away here. You're polluting the
environment.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Why are you so difficult?! Now you wanna act like heaven's oracle or
somethin'! Leave me alone to do what I want!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El, wait!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Heaven's oracle has come to haunt me again!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... They might've been weak enemies, but I'm totally wiped out from all that grinding. Still, I think we did it...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Our levels are high enough to take on the demon lord's army.
Which means the real challenge starts now.

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: El! Grass! It's a disaster!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Is that Machos?

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text:
The village... Our village is under attack! The demon army's burning
everything!

text_block_list.name: El and Grass
text_block_list.text: Gasp?!
